## Summary

Adds a `## Next: v13.1 — Harness Phase-1 + Reliability` section to `ROADMAP.md` (after "Shipped: v13", before "Current Focus: The Agent Harness"), capturing the team-converged v13.1 scope per @neo-opus-vega's authoritative map + @neo-opus-ada's `[v13.1 SCOPE]` broadcast. Cornerstones + rationale, NOT exhaustive — per the `update-roadmap` skill's shape (#13380).

Resolves #13391

Evidence: L1 — doc-only change (Markdown narrative); no runtime, schema, or test surface touched. The AC is editorial — the section exists and names the cornerstones + rationale + the deferred "out" + budget-as-ceiling — plus @neo-opus-vega's sign-off (she owns the `ROADMAP.md` merge/lock per our split: I draft, she signs).

## What's in the section

- **Thesis:** "v13 proved the institution; v13.1 gives it an operable face" — whole-organism, broad-foundation.
- **Harness phase-1 spine:** #13012 · #13015 · #13349 · #13376 · #13158 · #13056 · #13377.
- **4 reliability cornerstones:** #13390 (local-model RAM/context — *distinct from* the provider-routing epic #12740, same local-first goal) · #12065 (golden-path) · #13287 (wake) · #10291 (cloud-deploy).
- **Latest discussions:** #13370 **graduated** (quorum met 2026-06-15 → the #13158 docking reframe) · #13378 (OQ2/OQ4 open) + #13374 (not yet graduation-ready) **targeted-pending**.
- **Discipline:** #13380 (roadmap skill) · epic-ownership Discussion #13388 · agent-harness.md refresh.
- **Deferred → v13.2:** #12986 · #12679 · #12456 · #11404 · #10757 · #9950 · #9904 — dep-check clear (all `blocking:[]`, none gates a cornerstone).
- **Budget:** ~100–150 merged PRs as a **ceiling, not a fill-target**.

## Test Evidence

Doc-only; no tests apply. The diff is a single additive section in `ROADMAP.md` — no other files touched (`git diff --stat` = `ROADMAP.md` only). Links are standard GitHub issue/discussion/milestone URLs matching the file's existing link style.

## Deltas

- **Graduation state — cycle-2 correction:** **#13370 has graduated** (2026-06-15 22:02, §6.2 quorum met → #13158 reframe); **#13378 / #13374** remain **targeted-pending** (open OQs / pending quorum). *(My cycle-1 RC commit over-corrected all three to "not graduated"; cycle-2 restores #13370's actual graduated state — V-B-A'd against the live Discussion #13370 thread.)*
- **#13390 ↔ #12740 — cycle-2 correction:** framed as **distinct from the provider-routing epic #12740 (same local-first goal)**, not "supersedes" nor a "leaf of" #12740 (V-B-A: #12740 = open epic addressing *which provider runs*; #13390 = a distinct closed leaf addressing the *local-model context-window RAM footprint*, per #13390's own body). Removes the false parent-child graph edge.
- **Placement delta vs #13391's AC:** the AC said "after `## Current Focus`"; the section is placed **before** it (after "Shipped: v13") for the roadmap-natural *shipped → next → detail* flow. Deliberate refinement; @neo-opus-vega approved this placement.
- **Milestone #8 is NOT populated here** — that's the post-STEP_BACK/sign-off step, out of scope per the ticket.

## Post-Merge Validation

None required — doc-only change. Post-merge, confirm `ROADMAP.md` renders with the new `## Next: v13.1` section and its issue/discussion/milestone links resolve. No runtime, build, or test surface to re-validate.

## Review

@neo-opus-vega owns sign-off + merge + the `ROADMAP.md` lock (per our split); cross-family review requested from @neo-gpt (cycle-2 re-review requested after the two accuracy corrections above). Human merge is @tobiu's.

Authored by Grace (@neo-opus-grace, Claude Opus 4.8).
